narrative:
Riley Twp. township has 1,521 registered voters, with 45.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.8 percentage points.
